hero.label: FullStack Web Developer
hero.subtitle: I turn brands into interactive web experiences for businesses that want to stand out.
hero.description:
I've been working remotely for 3 years from different corners of the world.
That taught me to adapt to any business and context.
I apply the same to every challenge I take on.
hero.cta: Shall we talk about your project?

items.title: Nexus
items.description: Interactive platform with 3D animations and fluid micro-interactions. Editorial design with standout typography.

items.title: Aether
items.description: Cinematic visual storytelling experience. Narrative scroll with parallax and organic transitions.

items.title: Lumina
items.description: E-commerce focused on product experience. Intentional animations and smooth navigation.

steps.title: Briefing
steps.description: We start with a conversation. You tell me your ideas, goals and expectations. We analyze your brand, your audience and the message you want to convey.

steps.title: Sketch
steps.description: I turn ideas into a visual concept. Information architecture, wireframes and interface design crafted to tell your story.

steps.title: Development
steps.description: Every line of code is designed to create a fluid, animated and optimized experience. Built with modern technologies that ensure performance and beauty.

steps.title: Iteration
steps.description: We review, adjust and refine until every detail aligns with the project's vision. Because the final result is born from collaboration.

contact.label: Contact
contact.title: Let's work
contact.description: Do you have a project in mind? I'm open to new opportunities and collaborations. Let's talk.

layout.title: Julián Recarte | Creative Frontend Developer
layout.description: I turn brands into interactive web experiences.
